# Test: grove add --switch shows preserved files on stderr
setup_workspace

# Create .gitignore with .env pattern (required for preservation)
cp $WORK/gitignore-env .gitignore
exec git add .gitignore
exec git commit -m 'add gitignore'

# Create .env file to be preserved
cp $WORK/dot-env .env
exec grove add --switch feature/preserve-switch-test
stdout '^.*[/\\]feature-preserve-switch-test$'
! stderr 'Created worktree'
stderr 'preserved'
exists ../feature-preserve-switch-test/.env

-- gitignore-env --
.env

-- dot-env --
SECRET=value
